title: Anonymization - reference card for researchers
author: Hrudey, E. Jessica
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Reference card for researchers on anonymization - in order to engage them with research supporters and privacy specialists in their research institutions to deal with research data about people and risk management in a proper way. Also a Dutch version available through www.lcrdm.nl
steps_raw: Reference card for researchers on anonymization - in order to engage them with research supporters and privacy specialists in their research institutions to deal with research data about people and risk management in a proper way. Also a Dutch version available through www.lcrdm.nl
